requirements.title: Module Root Structure
requirements.description: The module system shall define a module root struct containing an API vtable pointer.
requirements.rationale: Required to ensure LibJuno operates reliably on bare-metal and freestanding targets without hosted OS assumptions.

requirements.title: Module Root Failure Handler
requirements.description: The module root shall contain a failure handler pointer and user data pointer.
requirements.rationale: Required to ensure LibJuno operates reliably on bare-metal and freestanding targets without hosted OS assumptions.

requirements.title: Module Derivation
requirements.description: Derived module structs shall embed the root as their first member, enabling safe upcasting to the root type.
requirements.rationale: Required to ensure LibJuno operates reliably on bare-metal and freestanding targets without hosted OS assumptions.

requirements.title: Module Union
requirements.description: A module union shall contain the root and all derivation types for polymorphic storage.
requirements.rationale: Required to ensure LibJuno operates reliably on bare-metal and freestanding targets without hosted OS assumptions.

requirements.title: Result Type
requirements.description: The module system shall define a result type combining a status code with a typed success payload.
requirements.rationale: Required to ensure LibJuno operates reliably on bare-metal and freestanding targets without hosted OS assumptions.

requirements.title: Option Type
requirements.description: The module system shall define an option type combining a presence flag with a typed payload.
requirements.rationale: Required to ensure LibJuno operates reliably on bare-metal and freestanding targets without hosted OS assumptions.
